imageAlt: Manage default enabled PPs roadmap item preview image
title: Manage default enabled PPs
summaryBody: This document is about managing default enabled PPs for the initiative of generating real revenue through progress payments. It includes tags related to invoicing & payment admin machines and provides links to project resources such as the project spec and release plan.
